info.title: Cloud Leopard Secure Center
info.description: OpenAPI 3.1 surface for tenants, organization units, spatial nodes, users, service accounts, roles, role bindings, authorization explain, devices, cameras, audit records, and configuration.

get.summary: Get an audit record by id.
Get a configuration definition by key.
Get a configuration value by id.
Get a managed device by id.
Get an organization unit by id.
Get a role binding by id.
Get a spatial node by id.

ApiKeyCreatedDto.description: Response containing a newly created API key (shown once).

AuditDetailsDto.description: Stable API representation of audit record details.

AuditRecordDto.description: Stable API representation of an audit record.

AuthExplainRequest.description: Request to preview an authorization decision.

CameraDto.description: Stable API representation of a camera.

ChangeUserStatusRequest.description: Request to change a user status.

ConfigDefinitionDto.description: Stable API representation of a configuration definition.

ConfigScopeDto.description: Stable API representation of a configuration scope.

ConfigValueDto.description: Stable API representation of a configuration value.

CreateOrganizationUnitRequest.description: Request to create an organization unit.

CreateRoleBindingRequest.description: Request to create a role binding.

CreateServiceAccountRequest.description: Request to create a service account.

CreateSpatialNodeRequest.description: Request to create a spatial node.

DeviceDto.description: Stable API representation of a managed device.

HealthDto.description: Health status returned by the root endpoint.

ManageMfaRequest.description: Request to enable or disable MFA.

MoveOrganizationUnitRequest.description: Request to move an organization unit.

MoveSpatialNodeRequest.description: Request to move a spatial node.

OrganizationUnitDto.description: Stable API representation of an organization unit.

ProblemDetailsDto.description: Generic API problem details sent by this service.

ResourceRefDto.description: Stable API representation of an explicit resource reference.

RoleBindingDto.description: Stable API representation of a role binding.

RoleBindingScopeDto.description: Stable API representation of a role-binding scope.

RoleDto.description: Stable API representation of a role.

SetPasswordRequest.description: Request to set a user's password.

SpatialNodeDto.description: Stable API representation of a spatial node.

TenantDto.description: Stable API representation of a tenant.

UpdateOrganizationUnitRequest.description: Request to update an organization unit.

UpdateRoleBindingRequest.description: Request to update a role binding.

UpdateSpatialNodeRequest.description: Request to update a spatial node.

UserDto.description: Stable API representation of a user.
